title: Implement Error Handling in Command Execution
description: Lack of error handling during command execution. Implement try-except blocks around the command execution logic to catch exceptions and provide meaningful error messages.

title: Input Validation for Parameters
description: Possible null dereferences with user inputs. Parameters should be thoroughly checked to ensure they exist and are of expected types before use. Implement comprehensive validation checks.

title: Implement Thread Safety in Command Registrations
description: Potential race conditions if commands are registered or accessed in a multi-threaded environment. Implement locking mechanisms when modifying shared state to ensure thread safety.

title: Replace Print Statements with Logging
description: Extensive use of print statements for debugging rather than logging. Implement a proper logging framework to assist in debugging while separating logs based on severity levels.

title: Audit for Hardcoded Secrets
description: Review all source code for any hardcoded credentials, API keys, or tokens. Replace them with environment variables for sensitive data management.

title: Implement Input Validation for User Inputs
description: Ensure all incoming parameters conform to expected formats. Implement schema validations to avoid issues related to unexpected types or values.

title: Implement Authentication Mechanisms
description: Ensure commands requiring sensitive operations have adequate checks to prevent unauthorized access. Implement authentication mechanisms as necessary.

title: Automate Dependency Risk Audits
description: Use tools like pip-audit or safety to automate the scanning of dependencies for known vulnerabilities. Regularly review and update dependencies.

title: Create Documentation Sync Process
description: Develop a process for keeping documentation in sync with code changes. Create guidelines for documenting parameters and expected outputs for commands.
